message:
feat(fnp-python): re-export numpy.random.BitGenerator

Eager setattr when numpy.random is importable at init; install a
PEP-562 __getattr__ on fnp_python.random that lazy-loads BitGenerator
from numpy.random on first access otherwise. Same lazy-resolution
pattern as linalg.LinAlgError (for numpy-less CI workers).

Result: `isinstance(fnp_python.random.PCG64(42), fnp_python.random.BitGenerator)`
resolves to numpy's real abstract base, matching numpy.random's class
identity exactly.

Extended random_namespace_matches_numpy_bit_generator_oracles to
assert BitGenerator is resolvable.

Part of franken_numpy-lxmb.
br-franken_numpy-g1ji
